confidence_rationale: This video is promotional/instructional material for a surgical training course (F.MAS/D.MAS Fellowship). It contains photographs and video snippets of operating rooms, training facilities, and course participants, but does NOT show a single complete, timed FLS task performance suitable for scoring. No task apparatus is clearly visible performing a defined FLS skill in real time.
cannot_determine: Task identification — no specific FLS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Suture) is being performed
Completion time — video is montage/promotional, not a timed performance
Penalties — no measurable task performance to assess
Scoring — this is instructional/promotional content, not a performance to score
technique_summary: This is educational/promotional video content, not an FLS task performance video. It showcases a surgical training course but does not contain footage of a trainee or surgeon performing a scoreable FLS task from start to finish.
notes: Video should be reclassified as 'unusable' for FLS scoring purposes. If task performance footage exists, please provide a video that shows a single, uninterrupted FLS task performance.
